2605.14765.title: Persian MusicGen: A Large-Scale Dataset and Culturally-Aware Generative Model for Persian Music
2605.14765.paper_summary: Persian music, with its unique tonalities, modal systems (Dastgah), and rhythmic structures, presents significant challenges for music generation models trained primarily on Western music. We address this gap by curating the first large-scale dataset of Persian songs, comprising over 900 hours high-quality audio samples across diverse sub-genres, including pop, traditional, and contemporary styles. This dataset captures the rich melodic and cultural diversity of Persian music and serves as the foundation for fine-tuning MusicGen, a state-of-the-art generative music model. We adapt MusicGen to this domain and evaluate its performance by utilizing subjective and objective metrics. To assess the semantic alignment between generated music and intended style tags, we report the proportion of relevant tags accurately reflected in the generated outputs. Our results demonstrate that the fine-tuned model produces compositions that more align with Persian stylistic conventions. This work introduces a new resource for generative music research and illustrates the adaptability of music generation models to underrepresented cultural and linguistic contexts.
2605.14765.paper_summary_zh: 波斯音樂以其獨特的音調、調式系統（Dastgah）和節奏結構，對主要以西方音樂為基礎訓練的音樂生成模型提出了重大挑戰。<lb/>我們通過策劃首個大規模的波斯歌曲數據集來填補這一空白，該數據集包含超過900小時的高品質音頻樣本，涵蓋流行、傳統和當代等多種子類型。<lb/>這個數據集捕捉了波斯音樂豐富的旋律和文化多樣性，並作為微調最先進的生成音樂模型MusicGen的基礎。<lb/>我們將MusicGen適應於這一領域，並通過利用主觀和客觀指標來評估其性能。<lb/>為了評估生成音樂與預期風格標籤之間的語義一致性，我們報告了在生成輸出中準確反映的相關標籤的比例。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，微調後的模型產生的作品更符合波斯風格的慣例。<lb/>這項工作為生成音樂研究引入了一個新資源，並展示了音樂生成模型在不足代表的文化和語言背景下的適應性。
2605.14765.author: Mohammad Hossein Sameti et.al.
2605.14765.authors: Mohammad Hossein Sameti, Diba Hadi Esfangereh, Sepehr Harfi Moridani, Leili Javidpour, Mahdieh Soleymani Baghshah
